warnings.volatile: This item is naturally volatile — evaluate with caution
warnings.spike: Possible artificial price spike before a "discount" detected

reasonCodes.SPIKE_14D_DETECTED: Artificial price spike in last 14 days
reasonCodes.PRICE_NEAR_MIN30: Price near 30-day low — a good deal
reasonCodes.HIGH_CATEGORY_VOLATILITY: This category naturally fluctuates in price
reasonCodes.INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY: Not enough data yet — analysis improves over time

preview.title: Preliminary analysis
preview.currentAtMin: Current price ({{price}} ₴) is the lowest we have seen. It may be a good time to buy.
preview.currentAtMax: Current price ({{price}} ₴) is near the highest level we observed (+{{pct}}% vs minimum).
preview.currentBetween: Current price ({{price}} ₴) is between our observed minimum and maximum (+{{pct}}% vs minimum).
preview.disclaimer: These prices are observed independently by us. The store may show "regular" and "sale" prices that are not part of our observations.

singlePrice.title: First confirmed price
singlePrice.footer: This is only the first observation so far. We can already show how long this price has held, but a reliable discount fairness score needs a few more history records.

status.unsupported: We don't monitor this store yet

feedback.prompt: Found a bug or want to add a new store?
feedback.placeholder: Describe the issue or enter the store name...

calculator.noHistory: Just started collecting price history for analysis.
calculator.firstPriceSame: First confirmation: this price has been stable for a while. More conclusions once we collect a few more observations.
calculator.firstPriceDiff: Only one recorded price in history. We can show when it was last seen, but a full analysis needs more observations.
calculator.insufficientData: Not enough valid data for analysis.
calculator.spike: Suspected manipulation: price was artificially raised to {{max}} ₴, now appearing as a "discount".
calculator.goodDeal: Great price — {{pct}}% below the usual. Looks like a genuine discount.
calculator.normal: Price within normal range. No significant discount, but no overpaying either.
calculator.highPrice: Price is {{pct}}% above normal for this item. Worth waiting.
calculator.veryHigh: Price is significantly above normal (+{{pct}}%). Not recommended to buy now.
calculator.spikeVolatile: Suspected manipulation: price was artificially raised to {{max}} ₴, now appearing as a "discount".
calculator.goodDealVolatile: Great price — {{pct}}% below the usual. Looks like a genuine discount. (Note: this item's price naturally fluctuates.)
calculator.normalVolatile: Price within normal range. No significant discount, but no overpaying either. (Note: this item's price naturally fluctuates.)
calculator.highPriceVolatile: Price is {{pct}}% above normal for this item. Worth waiting. (Note: this item's price naturally fluctuates.)
calculator.veryHighVolatile: Price is significantly above normal (+{{pct}}%). Not recommended to buy now. (Note: this item's price naturally fluctuates.)
